use_cases: Animated background for hero sections on landing pages
Continuous ambient background effect for SaaS landing pages
Soft gradient background for marketing sites
Animated backdrop for card and overlay components
Colorful background animation for web applications
ai_summary: A soft gradient background animation using OKLCH color space for smooth, vibrant color transitions. It creates an ambient, continuously animated background effect suitable for hero sections, landing pages, and decorative backdrops across various web applications.
